brand-story-bg-d4e5f6.query: Where Craft Meets Care Every Velmora piece begins as a sketch, shaped by hands that understand the weight of a well-made thing. We believe luxury shouldn't cost the earth — or your values. Our demi-fine collection is crafted with 18K gold plating over recycled brass, designed to be worn daily and treasured always.
